news.headline: Targus expands EcoSmart collection, promoting sustainability in tech accessories. #Targus #EcoSmart #Sustainability
news.summary: Showcasing the organization's ongoing dedication to fostering a greener tomorrow and offering user-friendly solutions, Targus® announces advancements in Anaheim, California on Dec. 4, 2024. Targus® stands as the top third-party producer of docking stations and laptop cases in the US, solidifying its position as a key player in the industry1.

news.headline: unWired Broadband expands high-speed internet to Isleton, CA with a new tower and Tarana Wireless tech, offering up to Gig speeds.
news.summary: unWired Broadband, a prominent high-speed Internet provider in California, unveiled their latest high-speed Internet service in Isleton, CA. The company has set up a telecommunications tower in the city, utilizing cutting-edge fixed wireless technology from Tarana Wireless to provide speeds of up to Gig. This collaboration aims to address the lack of Internet access in the underserved region, marking a significant step towards bridging the digital divide in the area.

news.headline: NYPD: Targeted attack on UnitedHealth Exec, shooting. No source disclosed.
VetClaims.AI partners with Purple Heart Foundation to improve VA claims support for veterans in Austin, Texas.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on December 4, 2024, Vetclaims.AI, a platform founded by veterans, announced a collaboration aimed at simplifying VA disability claims, broadening veteran support services, and improving resources. This initiative focuses on enhancing opportunities for veterans by leveraging technology to optimize their claims and streamline the process. The partnership aims to make a significant impact on the lives of veterans by offering tailored support and guidance in navigating the Department of Veterans Affairs system.

news.headline: New Punjabi Chaap Corner opens in Richmond Hill, Queens, serving authentic vegetarian Indian street food.
news.summary: A new popular dining spot has recently opened its doors in Richmond Hill, Queens. Punjabi Chaap Corner, known for its authentic vegetarian Indian street cuisine, is drawing in food enthusiasts in the area. The establishment is gaining recognition for its bold and robust flavors. This new hotspot has been creating a buzz since its opening in December 2024.

news.headline: Hyundai deploys 21 XCIENT hydrogen fuel-cell trucks for clean logistics operations in cooperation with Glovis America.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, in Ellabell, Georgia, a statement was made by Hyundai Motor Group Metaplant America (HMGMA) along with Glovis America revealing the launch of Hyundai XCIENT heavy-duty hydrogen fuel-cell electric trucks aimed at sustainable logistics. The initial deployment includes 21 XCIENT trucks for clean transportation operations.

news.headline: Lypid debuts plant-based BBQ Pork Piggy Bao at Moana 2 premiere in Hawai'i, first retail-ready product.
news.summary: In Honolulu on December 4, 2024, a new brand called Lypid Kitchen, a part of Lypid, introduced its inaugural retail product for the holidays. The product is the 100% plant-based BBQ Pork Piggy Bao, and it was launched at Disney's Moana 2 World Premiere in Oahu, Hawai'i. The unveiling took place in the presence of guests that included celebrities and the creative minds behind the movie.

news.headline: Amazon announces its own AI server, "Ultracluster" for AI models, challenging Nvidia. Stock gains, potential for both as AI winners.
news.summary: Following the announcement of its plans to develop its own AI server and an "Ultracluster" for training AI models, Amazon saw a rise in its stock value. This move by Amazon has led to speculation about the company challenging Nvidia's dominance in AI chips. Despite this competition, investors are optimistic about the potential for both companies to emerge as leaders in the AI sector. The news was covered in an article by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Analysts predict strong growth for two AI stock winners in 2024 from different industries.
news.summary: Two major beneficiaries of the artificial intelligence (AI) boom come from diverse sectors. Analysts predict that two large AI stocks are poised for success in 2024, with significant potential for growth.

news.headline: Shift4 CEO Jared Isaacman chosen to lead NASA, causing shares to drop. News reported by Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: The stock of Shift4 Payments experienced a decline after Chief Executive Jared Isaacman was selected by President-elect Donald Trump to lead NASA. This decision caused a drop in shares of the company.

news.headline: Enteligent named finalist for DC-coupled EV charging and PV solar MLPE by 26th Platts Global Energy Awards in 2 categories.
news.summary: A company based in Morgan Hill, California, known as Enteligent Inc., specializing in solar power optimization and electric vehicle solar charging innovations, has received acknowledgment as a finalist in two different sections at the respected 26th annual S&P Global Platts Global Energy Awards. The company has made it to the finals in the Emerging Technology of the Year and the Rising Star Company categories. Enteligent is being praised for its efforts in making clean energy solutions more efficient, cost-effective, and available to a broader audience through its DC-coupled technologies.

news.headline: Nader Sculpture Park opening on Dec 5 in Miami Design District during Art Basel, marking a new era for Miami's cultural scene.
news.summary: Tomorrow, on December 5, 2024, Miami will witness the long-awaited unveiling of the Nader Sculpture Park in the bustling Miami Design District. This event signals the city's transformation into a thriving cultural hub. The grand opening ceremony promises to be a significant milestone for Miami's art scene.

news.headline: China's gains spell losses for GM, with significant impact on revenue.
Faulkender expected as Deputy Treasury Secretary under Trump, sources say. #Bloomberg #news

Germs can spread to all bathroom surfaces after flushing toilet; disinfection vital. - Relevant data: 1) all restroom surfaces affected, 2) closing toilet lid doesn't mitigate risk, 3) effective disinfection key.
news.summary: Recent scientific studies have revealed that germs have the ability to transfer to all restroom surfaces following the flushing of a toilet. Contrary to popular belief, closing the toilet lid before flushing does not decrease this risk. Proper surface disinfection is crucial in halting the spread of germs. The significance of these findings is highlighted by a recent report in PARSIPPANY, N.J. dated December 4, 2024, pointing to the importance of effective hygiene practices in preventing the transmission of harmful bacteria. It serves as a reminder of the necessity to maintain clean toilet environments to curb the potential spread of germs.

news.headline: Details on the weekly repurchase program transactions, including key figures.
Pastor from Colorado plans to end Earth's shape debate by taking 4 flat earthers and 4 globe earthers to Antarctica on Dec. 14th.
news.summary: On December 14, 2024, in Denver, Pastor Will Duffy of Colorado announced his unique initiative to settle the debate on the shape of the Earth. His groundbreaking plan involves bringing together four proponents of the flat Earth theory and four believers in the spherical Earth theory to Antarctica. The goal is to provide firsthand experience and evidence by exploring the icy continent and conducting experiments. This unprecedented event will mark a significant step in understanding our planet better.

news.headline: Healthcare industry prioritizes AI investments in digital transformation, report by ResearchAndMarkets. Industry trends analyzed for 2024.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Digital Transformation and Emerging Technologies in the Healthcare Industry 2024 Edition" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection. This report delves into the advancements in digital transformation within the pharmaceutical sector. It evaluates the industry's readiness to adopt innovative technologies, delves into the obstacles and prospects linked with digital transformation, and sheds light on the present and upcoming trends in technology-focused investments.

news.headline: DAZN signs exclusive free-to-view deal with FIFA to broadcast FIFA Club World Cup 2025™ globally; all 63 matches included.
news.summary: Global sports streaming platform DAZN has secured an exclusive agreement with FIFA to broadcast the FIFA Club World Cup 2025™ worldwide. This landmark deal covers all 63 matches of the tournament. The arrangement marks a significant development for DAZN as it becomes the official broadcasting partner for this prestigious event, further solidifying its position as the world's largest sports streaming platform.

news.headline: Bangladesh construction industry growth to slow from 9.5% in 2023 to 6.2% in 2024 due to political instability.
news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report titled "Bangladesh Construction Market Size, Trends, and Forecasts by Sector" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Bangladeshi construction sector, which saw a growth of 9.5% in 2023, is predicted to slow down to 6.2% in 2024 due to factors such as reduced foreign direct investment and delays in project implementation. This industry analysis covers various sectors including commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets, with insights projected till 2028.

news.headline: Trump picks Gail Slater as Assistant Attorney General for the antitrust division at the Department of Justice.
Southwest Airlines (NYSE: LUV) to speak at Goldman Sachs Industrials and Materials Conference, webcast available.
news.summary: Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) has received an invitation to present at the Goldman Sachs Industrials and Materials Conference on December 4, 2024, in Dallas. The event will be webcasted live by Goldman Sachs, providing investors with valuable insights into Southwest Airlines' operations and performance. A link to access the audio presentation will be shared with interested parties, offering an opportunity to learn more about the airline industry and Southwest Airlines' strategic approach.

news.headline: UJA-Federation of New York's Wall Street Dinner raises $55 million, with Marc Lipschultz and Jeffrey Perlman honored for philanthropy.
news.summary: Two notable figures, Marc Lipschultz from Blue Owl Capital and Jeffrey Perlman from Warburg Pincus, have been recognized for their outstanding philanthropic contributions. The UJA-Federation of New York's Wall Street Dinner held in New York on December 4, 2024, revealed a remarkable fundraising achievement with a record-breaking $55 million gathered from the Wall Street community. This significant amount showcases the generosity and support from various individuals and organizations within the financial sector towards charitable causes.

news.headline: Anodot wins 2024 EMEA AWS Partner Award for Rising Star Technology, driving innovation for customers worldwide.
news.summary: Anodot, a prominent player in the tech industry, was recently honored with the Rising Star Technology Partner Award in the EMEA region. The award ceremony took place in Las Vegas on December 4, 2024. Anodot was recognized as one of the leading companies globally that assists customers in fostering innovation. This accolade solidifies Anodot's position as an innovative force in the market.

news.headline: New recipe page by F.E.P. features cultural vegan dishes for holidays, Dec 4, 2024, SAN LUIS OBISPO, offers plant-based alternatives.
news.summary: In San Luis Obispo, California, on December 4, 2024, the Food Empowerment Project (F.E.P.), a vegan food justice organization, launched a new webpage featuring a collection of culturally diverse vegan recipes for the holiday season. This online resource provides plant-based versions of traditional dishes, catering to different dietary preferences and encouraging a more sustainable and compassionate approach to cooking. Whether individuals are looking for a meat-free alternative or simply seeking to incorporate more plant-based options into their meals, this page offers a variety of recipes to choose from. Visit the website to explore these flavorful and festive vegan creations.

news.headline: Salesforce stock climbs on solid revenue growth, AI potential, boosting company's prospects.
Outcomes4Me and CURE® Media Group team up to provide cancer patients with access to resources for care.
news.summary: A new partnership has been formed to support cancer patients by giving them access to reliable resources for guidance throughout their treatment journey. Outcomes4Me Inc. has collaborated to offer evidence-based information to patients. This initiative aims to empower individuals with cancer by providing them with essential support. The partnership was announced in Boston on December 4, 2024. This collaboration marks a significant step in offering personalized care to patients, with a focus on ensuring they have access to important resources to aid them in making informed decisions about their health.

news.headline: Shareholders offered buyout at specified price in Unieuro tender offer on December 4, 2024.
Monthly update from Marie Brizard Wine & Spirits on total voting rights and shares.
Poolside and AWS partner to offer generative AI for software engineering on AWS platforms, utilizing AWS Trainium chips.
news.summary: A new service has been introduced to assist customers in seamlessly operating poolside software engineering foundation models within their AWS environment. These models can now be accessed on Amazon Elastic Cloud Compute (EC2, with future availability on Amazon Bedrock. The service harnesses the capabilities of AWS Trainium chips to enhance performance.

news.headline: Coinbase to list Gigachad and Turbo meme coins, leading to immediate price surges for Ethereum and Solana.
news.summary: Coinbase revealed intentions to add Gigachad and Turbo, two meme coins, to their platform. As a result, the prices of both coins surged significantly.

news.headline: New BLOOMAFEST Tremblant music festival in Tremblant on May 9 and 10, 2025. Hosted at the foot of the pedestrian village.
news.summary: Experience BLOOMAFEST Tremblant's inaugural edition on May 9 and 10, 2025, at Mont-Tremblant. The open-air event, held at the base of the pedestrian village, promises an unforgettable experience. Join us for this exciting festival starting...

news.headline: The Institutes' Pete Miller discusses AI in risk management during Travelers Institute webinar, focusing on Predict & Prevent model.
news.summary: Pete Miller from The Institutes in Malvern, Pennsylvania, discussed the impact of the AI-driven Predict & Prevent™ model on the Risk Management and Insurance (RMI) sector. The innovative model is significantly changing the industry landscape by leveraging artificial intelligence technology to enhance risk assessment and mitigation strategies.

ECB's Nagel: Favors Gradual, Cautious Approach to Rate Cuts
ECB's Nagel: No objection to rate cut, but reserving judgment until meeting
Joachim Nagel, President of Bundesbank, speaks in Luxembourg
ECB's Nagel says no significant recovery expected in Germany in the short term

Scientific Games selected as Ohio Lottery's new gaming system partner to drive growth.
news.summary: A technology company has secured a contract to provide an advanced solution for driving growth in Ohio's education programs. Scientific Games, based in Atlanta, revealed on December 4, 2024, that they have been chosen as the provider of the Ohio Lottery's latest lottery gaming system technology. This new system is aimed at supporting the state's educational initiatives and will play a vital role in shaping the future of the Ohio Lottery.

news.headline: Rising inflation jeopardizes forecasted Fed rate cuts. Learn more for crucial insights.
$1.6 million available for NSF tissue engineering research on ISS National Lab in annual solicitation.
news.summary: The latest solicitation is now available for numerous awards to assist in space-based tissue engineering and mechanobiology research at the Kennedy Space Center, Florida. As of December 4, 2024, the U.S. National Science Foundation (NSF) has initiated this funding opportunity for the eighth year in a row. Projects in this field are being sought through the solicitation, with multiple awards anticipated to be granted to support research in these areas.

news.headline: Kings Care Foundation announces holiday events with partners, incl. Children's Hospital LA and Crypto.com in Los Angeles.
news.summary: The holiday events lineup of Kings Care Foundation was revealed in Los Angeles, with the team and partners such as Children’s Hospital Los Angeles and Crypto.com joining in.

news.headline: Batteries Plus wins Franchise Update Media STAR Award for 2024 for Best Franchise Development Website.
news.summary: A renowned battery retailer, Batteries Plus, headquartered in HARTLAND, Wis., received the prestigious Franchise Development Website Award on Dec. 4, 2024. Considered the top consumer and business specialty battery franchise globally, Batteries Plus stood out among competitors to win this recognition. This award showcases their exemplary website, emphasizing their commitment to franchise development.

news.headline: OneRail receives $42M investment from Aliment Capital for growth; focuses on last mile omnichannel fulfillment.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, OneRail, a prominent player in last-mile omnichannel fulfillment solutions, has revealed a significant growth capital investment. This investment, spearheaded by Los Angeles' Aliment Capital, a global investment firm focusing on the food industry, health, nutrition, and supply chain, is aimed at advancing OneRail's software as a service platform, OmniPoint®. The investment will enable the company to enhance its capabilities for dynamic fulfillment.

news.headline: South Korea's President Yoon faces 37% chance of impeachment by 2024; stock market affected, Samsung down 1.12%.
news.summary: South Korean President Yoon Suk Yeol is facing political uncertainty, leading to active trading on prediction market Polymarket. The data indicates a 37% chance of Yoon being impeached by the end of 2024, while there is a 29% probability of his removal from office, highlighting the growing instability in the country. This situation has had an impact on South Korea's financial markets, with major tech and industrial stocks like Samsung Electronics (OTC:SSNLF), SK Hynix (OTC:HXSCF), and Hyundai Motor (OTC:HYMTF) experiencing declines of 1.12%, 0.061%, and 0.70% respectively. This turmoil has also spilled over to U.S.-listed South Korean equities, with Posco Holdings (NYSE:PKX) dropping by 4.36% in regular trading.

news.headline: 13th Annual MJBizCon in Las Vegas welcomes thousands of cannabis professionals to largest B2B event; hope for rescheduling and SAFER Banking.
news.summary: Today, MJBizCon, the leading B2B cannabis event globally, commenced at the Las Vegas Convention Center, marking its 13th annual event. This year's gathering is particularly significant following the initial hearing on marijuana rescheduling. Sarah Wilson, the vice president of events & sales at MJBizCon, expressed optimism about the potential for rescheduling and the promising outlook for SAFER Banking. The event serves as a platform for the cannabis industry to unite and explore future opportunities.

news.headline: EQA announces Ozark Steel acquired by Dakota Holdings, strengthening Dakota's steel platform.
news.summary: Eight Quarter Advisors (EQA) recently acted as the exclusive sell-side advisor for Ozark Steel Fabricators, Inc. during its acquisition by Dakota Holdings, LLC. Dakota Holdings, a private investment firm located in Dallas, Texas, is focused on enhancing its portfolio of structural steel fabricators and erectors. The acquisition aligns with Dakota Holding's strategy to bolster its position in the market and support the growth initiatives of its existing entity, Staley Steel based in Dallas. This move sets the stage for potential expansion opportunities for the companies involved in the transaction.
